message:
fix(dolt): add retry-aware DB helpers and expand retryable error coverage

Add execContext/queryContext/queryRowContext helper methods that wrap
database calls with server-mode retry logic for transient errors.
Replace all direct s.db.ExecContext and s.db.QueryContext calls across
11 storage files to use these helpers. Also add 3 missing retryable
error patterns: lost connection (MySQL 2013), server gone away (MySQL
2006), and i/o timeout.

Fixes: dolt-test-61gp, dolt-test-6hs2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:

@@ -58,6 +58,21 @@ func TestIsRetryableError(t *testing.T) {
 			err:      errors.New("Database Is Read Only"),
 			expected: true,
 		},
+		{
+			name:     "lost connection - retryable (MySQL error 2013)",
+			err:      errors.New("Error 2013: Lost connection to MySQL server during query"),
+			expected: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name:     "server gone away - retryable (MySQL error 2006)",
+			err:      errors.New("Error 2006: MySQL server has gone away"),
+			expected: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name:     "i/o timeout - retryable",
+			err:      errors.New("read tcp 127.0.0.1:3307: i/o timeout"),
+			expected: true,
+		},
 		{
 			name:     "syntax error - not retryable",
 			err:      errors.New("Error 1064: You have an error in your SQL syntax"),
